name: Carne Guisada
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb. boneless chuck meat, cut into bite-sized pieces
2 to 3 cans whole tomatoes (or 2 to 3 fresh)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
2. Add the meat and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
3. Add onions, bell pepper, and garlic to the skillet. Cook for an additional 5 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
4. Stir in flour and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
5. Pour in water, tomatoes, salt, black pepper, and cumin.
6. Bring the mixture to a simmer, then cover and reduce heat to low.
7. Simmer for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the meat is tender.
8. Serve as a main dish or with flour tortillas.
